title: Networking Fundamentals Quiz
description: Test your networking and TCP/IP knowledge.

questions.question: What is the main difference between TCP and UDP?

options.text: TCP uses IP addresses; UDP uses MAC addresses
TCP guarantees reliable, ordered delivery; UDP is faster but has no delivery guarantee
TCP is for HTTP; UDP is for HTTPS
UDP can handle more connections simultaneously

questions.question: What is the purpose of a NAT Gateway in a VPC?

options.text: To expose private subnet resources to incoming internet traffic
To allow resources in private subnets to initiate outbound internet connections without being publicly accessible
To translate domain names to IP addresses
To balance traffic between availability zones

questions.question: What DNS record type maps a domain name to an IPv4 address?
